entries.title: HOMILIES ON JEREMIAH 12:8.3 on proverbs 18:12
entries.excerpt: There is nothing to be proud about. For to sink to the state of being proud has its consequences according to the text: "Before ruin the heart of man is exalted and before glory it is humble." These words [also] concern the text: "Hear and hearken, and do not be proud, because the Lord has spoken."
